title: Final Calm
subtitle: Resting before the transition
description: At this final stage, your body may need maximum rest while staying aware of changes. Sleep may be minimal, so focusing on calmness, comfort, and support can help you feel prepared for the transition ahead.
what_to_expect: Maximum need for rest and recovery
Very limited or highly disrupted sleep
Strong awareness of body signals and readiness
rest_practices: Rest whenever possible without strict schedules
Use full support for comfort in all resting positions
Allow your body to guide your rest and recovery needs
mindfulness_practices: Practice deep breathing or guided relaxation regularly
Engage in calming activities like soft music or quiet reading
Create a peaceful and reassuring environment
emotional_wellbeing: Stay calm and trust your body's process
Focus on reassurance and emotional support
important_note: Prioritizing rest and calm awareness can support a smoother transition.
reassurance: You are prepared — trust your body and the care you have given throughout this journey.
medical_disclaimer: Consult a qualified healthcare professional before making significant changes to your routine.

diabetes.personalized_description: Flexible routines and adequate rest support stable energy and blood sugar levels during this phase.
rest_practices: Maintain regular meal timing alongside flexible rest
Monitor your body's response to energy fluctuations

anemia.personalized_description: Fatigue may be at its highest, requiring maximum rest and minimal exertion.
rest_practices: Take frequent and extended rest breaks
Avoid prolonged or physically demanding activities
mindfulness_practices: Engage in calming practices to conserve energy
anemia.reassurance: Rest supports your energy and comfort.

hypertension.personalized_description: Calm routines and supported rest help maintain stable blood pressure levels.
rest_practices: Maintain a calm and flexible rest routine
mindfulness_practices: Focus on slow and steady breathing

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent awareness and rest support hormonal balance and energy levels.
rest_practices: Maintain gentle and consistent rest patterns
mindfulness_practices: Use simple mindfulness techniques to reduce stress

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, prioritizing rest, calmness, and awareness is essential in this final stage.
priority_practices: Rest whenever needed without strict schedules
Incorporate regular relaxation or breathing exercises
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Supportive routines help maintain comfort and readiness for the transition ahead.
